CustomField.formula: January_Forecasted_Income__c + February_Forecasted_Income__c + Forecast_Sales_in_March__c + Forecast_Sales_in_April__c + May_Forecasted_Income__c + Forecast_Sales_in_June__c + Forecast_Sales_in_July__c + Forecast_Sales_in_August__c + September_Forecasted_Income__c + Forecast_Sales_in_October__c + Forecast_Sales_in_November__c + Forecast_Sales_in_December__c
CustomField.label: Total Estimated Sales Income
